{% extends "base.html" %} {% block hero %}

Sevgi

Create SVG with Ruby

Get Started DSL Catalog

Plain Ruby

Keep the drawing, its data, and its calculations in the same Ruby file.

Drawing helpers

Use the built-in helpers for repeated shapes, hatching, layout, and transforms. Add project-specific words with mixins.

Readable SVG

Write indented SVG that remains easy to inspect, diff, and edit.

Script mode

Run a .sevgi file directly when the drawing is the whole program.

SVG round trip

Turn existing SVG or XML into Sevgi source, including files made in a visual editor.

Optional export

Install the native export dependencies only when you need PDF or PNG output.
